posts.author: MoorvaleMarketFan_42
posts.text: Big news for everyone! The annual Moorvale Market is hosting a special exhibition of local artists and crafters this Saturday morning. Come along to support our wonderful community businesses and enjoy the atmosphere. #MoorvaleMarket #LocalArt
posts.explanation: The post is a harmless public event announcement with no policy violations.
posts.bio: Fictional events, culture and local announcements.
